title: Mace bonk sound
description: a resource pack that changes the mace sound for a bonk
body:
This resource allows you to play the Minecraft mace sound effect whenever the item is swung, hit, or used, providing an immersive audio experience that enhances combat interactions, adds realism to gameplay, and can be integrated into custom animations or resource packs for a more engaging environmen or for the gang this pack changes the mace hit for a "Bonk" sound. Not only replaces it, the pack merges the soud to avoid making it boring
